mapper.select: SELECT ci.id, fr.name AS organization, sp.name AS partnerUnit, DATE_FORMAT(o.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS documentDate, o.number AS documentNumber, ci.money AS amount FROM cost_info ci LEFT JOIN oce o ON o.id = ci.oce LEFT JOIN frame fr ON fr.id = o.frame LEFT JOIN supplier sp ON sp.id = o.supplier WHERE ci.pid = #{id} ORDER BY o.time, ci.id

SELECT r.id AS id, r.source AS clazz, CASE r.type WHEN 'sell' THEN '销售单' WHEN 'buy' THEN '采购单' WHEN 'sre' THEN '销售退货单' WHEN 'bre' THEN '采购退货单' ELSE '其它单' END AS documentType, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN f.name WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN f.name WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN f.name WHEN r.type IN ('bre') THEN f.name ELSE '默认组织' END AS organization, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN supplier.name WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN customer.name WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN customer.name ELSE supplier.name END AS partnerUnit, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN b.time WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN s.time WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN sr.time ELSE br.time END AS documentDate, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN b.number WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN s.number WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN sr.number ELSE br.number END AS documentNumber, COALESCE(bb.type, sb.type, srb.type) AS expenseType, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN b.total WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN s.total WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN sr.total ELSE br.total END AS amount, CASE WHEN r.type IN ('buy') THEN CASE b.cse WHEN 0 THEN '未结算' WHEN 1 THEN '部分结算' WHEN 2 THEN '已结算' WHEN 3 THEN '无需结算' ELSE '未知' END WHEN r.type IN ('sell') THEN CASE s.cse WHEN 0 THEN '未结算' WHEN 1 THEN '部分结算' WHEN 2 THEN '已结算' WHEN 3 THEN '无需结算' ELSE '未知' END WHEN r.type IN ('sre') THEN CASE sr.cse WHEN 0 THEN '未结算' WHEN 1 THEN '部分结算' WHEN 2 THEN '已结算' WHEN 3 THEN '无需结算' ELSE '未知' END ELSE CASE br.cse WHEN 0 THEN '未结算' WHEN 1 THEN '部分结算' WHEN 2 THEN '已结算' WHEN 3 THEN '无需结算' ELSE '未知' END END AS settlementStatus FROM record r LEFT JOIN buy b ON r.source = b.id AND r.type IN ('buy') LEFT JOIN sell s ON r.source = s.id AND r.type IN ('sell') LEFT JOIN bre br ON r.source = br.id AND r.type IN ('bre') LEFT JOIN sre sr ON r.source = sr.id AND r.type IN ('sre') LEFT JOIN buy_bill bb ON bb.pid = r.source LEFT JOIN sell_bill sb ON sb.pid = r.source LEFT JOIN bre_bill brb ON brb.pid = r.source LEFT JOIN sre_bill srb ON srb.pid = r.source LEFT JOIN frame f ON ( (b.frame IS NOT NULL AND f.id = b.frame) OR (s.frame IS NOT NULL AND f.id = s.frame) OR (sr.frame IS NOT NULL AND f.id = sr.frame) OR (br.frame IS NOT NULL AND f.id = br.frame) ) LEFT JOIN supplier ON ( (b.supplier IS NOT NULL AND supplier.id = b.supplier) OR (br.supplier IS NOT NULL AND supplier.id = br.supplier) ) LEFT JOIN customer ON ( (s.customer IS NOT NULL AND customer.id = s.customer) OR (sr.customer IS NOT NULL AND customer.id = sr.customer) ) WHERE r.source IS NOT NULL AND (bb.money IS NOT NULL OR sb.money IS NOT NULL OR srb.money IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY r.time DESC;
